evoscientist.label: EvoScientist
evoscientist.cmd:
bash -c 'set -euo pipefail
workspace="$1"
base_prompt="$2"
extra_prompt="$(cat <<EOF
### EvoScientist Path Usage
- The current working directory is already the workspace root. Use relative paths from . for all file-oriented tools.
- Allowed examples: ls(.), ls(data), ls(related_work), read_file(data/...), and writing to code/..., outputs/..., and report/....
- Do not pass the absolute workspace path to file-oriented tools.
EOF
)"
current_prompt="${base_prompt}

${extra_prompt}"
exec /mnt/shared-storage-user/yetianlin/ResearchClawBench/.venv/bin/evosci --ui cli --workdir "$workspace" --auto-approve -p "$current_prompt"' -- <WORKSPACE> <PROMPT>
